Client tracker preview for Mercy Oceans Midwifery and Birth Services

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Mercy Oceans Midwifery and Birth Services: One board for every family from the free consult and Mobile Midwife intake through the monthly / bi-weekly / weekly prenatal cadence, labor on-call, and the day 1 / day 3 / day 7 home and 3-week / 6-week office postpartum visits.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Your first consultation is free, monthly prenatal visits until 28 weeks, then every two weeks until 36 weeks, day 1, day 3, and day 7 after the birth, I have an excellent insurance biller who will file a claim

Today ops snapshot Prenatal + home birth + postpartum board Family record Consult + intake view Prenatal cadence + on-call window Postpartum + well-baby view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every family's prenatal cadence (monthly, then bi-weekly at 28 weeks, weekly at 36 weeks) surfaced automatically by gestational age.
  • Labor on-call + 2-hour post-birth minimum and the three childbirth classes at 34 / 36 / 37 weeks tracked on the same record.
  • Postpartum ladder (day 1 / day 3 / day 7 home + 3 wk / 6 wk office) and well-baby checks tied to insurance biller status, supply list, and tub prep.
